read_paths.description: Glob patterns the skill is allowed to read. Relative to repo root.

write_paths.description: Glob patterns the skill is allowed to write. Writes to non-listed paths are redirected to shadow/.

invoke_skills.description: Explicit list of skill names this skill is allowed to invoke. Empty list = no cross-skill calls permitted.

threshold_runs.description: Total clean runs required before auto-promotion is eligible.

threshold_clean_streak.description: Consecutive clean runs required (within threshold_runs window) for auto-promotion.
